title: Berisfords 15 mm Hand Made with Love Ribbon, Natural 13677-NT-15
features: Add a personal touch to a handmade card or gift with this thoughtful print
Measures 20 metre length by 15 mm width
description: Product Description Beresford's hand made with love ribbon. Add a personal touch to a handmade card or gift with this thoughtful print. The ribbon is machine washable, wash as synthetics at 50 percent cool iron, do not bleach, it can also be ironed, tumble dried and dye cleaned, thus making it very versatile. Available in natural colour. Unique and versatile. Measures 20 metre length by 15 mm width. Box Contains 1 x 20 metre Length Ribbon Reel
